evaluation_standard_version.transition_note: TECHNICAL_CLOSURE_v1 is historical evidence only and cannot establish final closure. Every previously closed Topic, including DSH-001, is re-evaluated under REAL_EXPERIENCE_CLOSURE_v2. DSH-001 technical wiring remains verified, but missing required visual states block closure.

retroactive_closure_rules.no_retroactive_exemption: Any previously closed Topic must be re-evaluated under the current closure standard when user-reported visual or runtime evidence exposes a gap.
retroactive_closure_rules.evidence_gap_is_blocker: Any missing required visual state, required surface state, manual navigation proof, or runtime state proof blocks closure.
retroactive_closure_rules.context_only_is_not_closure: A context-only surface is accepted only when declared read-only before implementation and all required read-only evidence states are present.
retroactive_closure_rules.current_enforcement: REAL_EXPERIENCE_CLOSURE_v2 applies to every Topic without grandfathering.

topic_definition.description: A Topic is a full-stack operational unit covering every layer from backend to all required surfaces. It is NOT a single screen, feature, or UI improvement.
topic_is_NOT: a read-only card without state coverage
a shared wiring proof without surface UI
topic_definition.closure_requires: All required layers AND all required surfaces must have live runtime evidence including real experience states before a Topic may be declared CLOSED.

full_stack_multi_surface_model.principle: Every DSH Topic must close Full-Stack AND Multi-Surface simultaneously. A Topic is not CLOSED if any required surface is missing, unverified, or has only success-state evidence.
full_stack_multi_surface_model.shared_brain_rule: All business logic, controllers, view-models, and state machines live in services/<service>/frontend/shared/. Surfaces consume shared — they do not own logic.
full_stack_multi_surface_model.surface_ui_rule: Surface files in services/<service>/frontend/<surface>/ are UI-only. They import controllers/hooks from shared. Any business logic in a surface file is an OWNERSHIP_VIOLATION.

real_experience_closure_standard.principle: A Topic surface is not CLOSED unless it proves the full user experience, not just the happy path. All required surfaces must show all required states with visual evidence.
real_experience_closure_standard.visual_evidence_requirement: At least one screenshot per state declared by the Topic for each required surface. Public read surfaces use service_unavailable/offline instead of permission_denied when authentication is not part of the active contract. Read-only role surfaces require loading, success, and error screenshots.
real_experience_closure_standard.manual_navigation_requirement: Manual navigation proof (text log or screenshot sequence) showing the actor can reach and use the surface in the real runtime environment.
real_experience_closure_standard.api_binding_requirement: Surface must be wired to real API via generated client through shared controller. No mock/demo/preview data.
real_experience_closure_standard.shared_brain_binding_requirement: Surface must import from owning_shared_brain. No inline API calls, no local business logic.

read_only_surface_exception.rule: A read-only surface is valid ONLY if: (1) it is pre-declared in the Topic as read_only_surfaces, (2) the read operation is the correct business experience for that actor in that Topic, and (3) it still requires loading/success/error visual evidence.
read_only_surface_exception.forbidden: A read-only surface is NOT valid as a substitute for a required interactive surface.

what_does_NOT_count_as_closure: technical wiring only (controllers wired but no surface UI)
shared binding proof without rendered surface
first-store fallback used in screenshots instead of real actor flow
single success screenshot with no error or loading evidence
table-only control-panel without KPI strip, filters, and state views
README claiming PASS without evidence files
smoke-only API test without DB data
screenshot taken from dev fixture, not live runtime
mock or demo data in screenshots
unit tests covering states but no visual evidence of UI rendering those states

screenshot_evidence_standard.exception: If a state is genuinely unreachable in the current runtime (e.g. disabled is always false), document the reason in the Topic's evidence README. Do not skip silently.

RUNTIME_VERIFIED.meaning: All required layers and surfaces have live runtime evidence. All gates pass. Visual evidence present per surface per required state.
requires: Live API smoke with real DB data (not mock)
Visual evidence screenshots per surface per required state (v2 standard)
All required surfaces shown with loading, success, empty, error states

PARTIAL.meaning: Some surfaces or layers are RUNTIME_VERIFIED, but at least one required surface/layer is NOT_STARTED or BLOCKED.
PARTIAL.action: Document which surfaces/layers remain and list them as blockers. PARTIAL is not a valid final state.

NOT_STARTED.meaning: No implementation has begun for this Topic.
NOT_STARTED.action: All required fields must still be defined in topic-registry.json.

BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.meaning: Implementation cannot begin because a prerequisite is missing. The blocker must be named explicitly.
BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.forbidden: Using BLOCKED_WITH_REASON without a specific named prerequisite.

FIX_REQUIRED.meaning: Implementation exists but a gate failure, evidence contradiction, ownership violation, or real experience gap has been found. Cannot be declared CLOSED until fixed.
triggers: Ownership violation found in any surface
Evidence contradiction between machine-readable and code
Required surface has only success-state screenshots (v2 standard)
Mock/demo/preview data found in runtime code paths
Context-only surface declared as required surface without real experience

DO_NOT_MERGE.meaning: Branch has a known violation, conflicting evidence, or pending FIX_REQUIRED item that blocks safe merging. Must not be merged until resolved.
triggers: Active ownership violation (business logic in surface)

UNKNOWN.meaning: Status cannot be determined from current evidence. Must be resolved before any new Topic begins.
UNKNOWN.action: Run all gates, check evidence, resolve to a known status.

ci_policy.rule: CI is NOT configured for this branch. This is NOT a gate failure — it is documented as CI_NOT_CONFIGURED.
ci_policy.forbidden: Declaring CI: PASS when no CI pipeline has run.
ci_policy.required_documentation: CI status must always be CI_NOT_CONFIGURED or CI_PASS with evidence, never assumed.
ci_policy.gate_substitute: Manual evidence pack (evidence-index.json) is the gate in the absence of CI.
ci_policy.escalation: Before any production deploy, CI must be configured and green.

mock_demo_preview_policy.rule: No mock, demo, or preview runtime data in production code paths.
mock_demo_preview_policy.exception: Dev-only fixtures inside `_skeleton-proof/` or guarded by `dev-fixtures-isolation-guard.ts` are permitted as DEV_ALLOWED. They must not reach production code paths.
mock_demo_preview_policy.violation_handling: Any mock/demo/preview found in runtime = FIX_REQUIRED immediately.

source_of_truth_hierarchy: 1. GitHub Remote + live code + evidence files
2. Guard outputs + test results + runtime smoke

financial_boundary_rule.principle: WLT is the sole owner of financial truth. DSH is the operational layer.
financial_boundary_rule.violation_handling: Any financial mutation outside services/wlt/ = DO_NOT_MERGE

port_policy.exception: Container port 8080 inside compose.runtime.yml mapped to host 58080 is permitted. Port 8083 inside compose mapped to host 58083 is permitted. Neither may appear as host ports.

readme_contradiction_rule: If any machine-readable JSON contradicts the actual code or evidence, the code wins and this file must be updated immediately.

ownership_violation_rule.business_logic_in_surface: FIX_REQUIRED — business logic must move to shared/
ownership_violation_rule.tamagui_outside_ui_kit: FIX_REQUIRED — all UI must go through @bthwani/ui-kit
ownership_violation_rule.fetch_in_screen: FIX_REQUIRED — screens must use generated typed clients via shared controllers
ownership_violation_rule.topic_logic_in_surface_not_shared: FIX_REQUIRED — Topic logic belongs in owning_shared_brain

wlt_activation_rule.condition: WLT-000 Foundation is RUNTIME_VERIFIED. WLT implementation slices (WLT-001+) require separate approval.
wlt_activation_rule.wlt_000_status: RUNTIME_VERIFIED — reference endpoints only, no mutation APIs
wlt_activation_rule.wlt_001_plus: NOT_APPROVED — requires dedicated approval before implementation

forbidden: Placing financial mutation inside DSH layers

control_panel_section_rule.rule: No Topic may reference control-panel without specifying which section(s) it touches.
control_panel_section_rule.violation: Any Topic specifying control-panel as a surface without naming sections = FIX_REQUIRED

rtl_i18n.rule: RTL required; translation keys only; no hardcoded strings; Arabic typography via ui-kit tokens; localized number/date/currency formatting
rtl_i18n.guard: no violation detected — enforced by ui-kit token system

rbac_tenant.client_actor: client own data only; deny cross-tenant without object existence leak
rbac_tenant.operator_actor: operator role-scoped; audited; support operational read only without payment card data
rbac_tenant.captain_actor: captain assigned tasks only; no cross-captain data
rbac_tenant.partner_actor: partner own store data only; deny cross-partner without existence leak
rbac_tenant.auth_source: actor, role, tenant, assignment, and object scope from core identity

audit_privacy.rule: audit actor_id actor_role object_id action from_state to_state correlation_id timestamp; mask phone/location; never log payment secrets; mask provider references
audit_privacy.applies_to: all write operations, financial operations, order state transitions, WLT state transitions, support escalations

idempotency.rule: All state transitions must be idempotent. Duplicate transition = no-op + audited rejection logged.

build_targets.control_panel: local web/control-panel runtime; production deploy reserved until CI is configured
build_targets.backend: Docker compose runtime only; canonical ports enforced

rollback_compensation.invalid_state_transition: no state mutation; audited rejection logged
rollback_compensation.dispatch_failure_after_authorization: release WLT payment authorization hold; requeue order
rollback_compensation.provider_timeout: query provider status before retry; do not assume failure
rollback_compensation.slice_rollback: restore pre-slice inventory state; remove unapproved slice artifacts

additional_file_justification.policy: The canonical machine-readable set is exactly 10 files. Additional files are permitted ONLY when a guard reads them directly and restructuring the guard is out of scope for this task.

csv_files_deleted_record.slice_execution_master_matrix_v3.csv: DELETED 2026-06-22 — 1182 rows extracted. Canonical domain data moved to: architecture-map.json#dsh_order_state_machine, architecture-map.json#dsh_dispatch_policy, architecture-map.json#notification_triggers, architecture-map.json#external_dependencies, architecture-map.json#pricing_policy_summary, architecture-map.json#cod_policy_summary. Guard guard-slice-master-matrix-v3.mjs rewritten to read from JSON files.
csv_files_deleted_record.slice_execution_master_matrix.csv: DELETED 2026-06-22 — cross-cutting rules moved to governance.json#cross_cutting_rules. Guard guard-slice-master-matrix-v2.mjs rewritten to validate canonical JSON files.

machine-readable/control-panel-design/co.action: KEEP — guard reads this path directly.

machine-readable/dsh-wlt/dsh_001_cross_s.action: KEEP — do not move to canonical set without updating guard paths.

additional_file_justification.no_other_files_permitted: No other files may be added to machine-readable/ without documenting justification here.
